title: Meta Introduces Prescription-Optimized AI Glasses
text: Meta introduced its first prescription-optimized AI glasses, Ray-Ban Meta Blayzer Optics and Ray-Ban Meta Scriber Optics, expanding its wearable AI product line. The glasses are designed for people who rely on prescription eyewear and include new lightweight frame styles, overextension hinges, interchangeable nose pads, and optician-adjustable temple tips. Meta also announced additional software capabilities for AI glasses, including hands-free nutrition tracking, WhatsApp summaries, recall by Meta AI, and Neural Handwriting. This news is useful evidence because it connects Meta's Reality Labs and AI strategy to consumer hardware. The product expansion suggests Meta is trying to move beyond phone-based social apps into AI-powered wearable devices. At the same time, the effort carries execution risk because consumer hardware and immersive technology require large investment, strong adoption, and continued product improvement.
